label: Set
description: A named collection of entities of one type (sample_set, interval_set, candidate_set, site_set, group_set). Per LAYER_GRAPH_BUILDER_SPEC.md §2.

label: Filter
description: A deterministic set → set transformation (predicate, intersection, union, difference, from_inline).

label: Layer
description: A unit of data the atlas resolves. Has a source_kind (file / analysis_result / operation / inline).

label: Analysis
description: A KIND of computation declared in analysis_registry.tsv. Consumes input_layer_types + sets; produces layer_id(s).

label: Hook
description: A page / panel / widget request. Declares requires_layers + optional_layers.
